---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What are you trying to do, and what's painful about doing it today?

## Proposed solution
A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen. UI sketches or pseudocode welcome.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context
Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, or anything else that helps frame the request.
